title: Dark Harlem Black Knight Heavy Box Shirt
description:
A heavyweight cotton tee finished with the Swarovski® crystal DHK emblem. Built to carry the Dark Harlem Knight identity with a clean silhouette, sharp finish, and elevated everyday weight.

Each piece arrives with a premium silk logo bag.

Details

  • • Sizes: S–3XL
  • • Weight: 330 gsm
  • • Material: 100% cotton
  • • Logo: DHK emblem made with Swarovski® crystals
  • • Rhinestone Color: AB crystals
  • • Color: Black
  • • Includes premium silk logo bag
